title: Items on the Calendar View don't show the same information from the Mobile app as from the Desktop app
excerpt:
I would like to know why the Items on the Calendar View don’t show the same information from the Mobile app as from the Desktop app or Browser platform. 
I would like to see the information on the Mobile app as you see i…

posts.author: TomMitchinson (Tom Mitchinson)
posts.cookedHtml:
I would like to know why the Items on the Calendar View don’t show the same information from the Mobile app as from the Desktop app or Browser platform.

I would like to see the information on the Mobile app as you see it on the platform, instead of only viewing the item name.

We have people working out on-site that need to see all the information from their mobile phone. Defeats the purpose of the mobile app if it doesnt show the same information as they cant actually use the software for what we need it to do.
